{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032121302605B7B00777BD72180492"}"},"total":1503},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7194273408434242363","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"针不戳，主角不圣母，不舔狗，把天命之子搞得大小便失禁，看的太爽了，纯纯反派大爽文，就是作者能不能在某些细节方面写的再细节点[奸笑]有的地方属实是不知道干了啥，到底是上了还是没上，希望作者大大能明白我们这些读者的心情[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1675047402,"group_id":"7144134959681244194","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"所有失去的  都会以另一种方式归来","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6M2GTXSA2pym0TRQAGgJsM=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/9364027337a1452d959510049351528f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622210&x-signature=e1y5Lzs5D4UetuqRPAqce7VyabY%3D","user_id":"111610004020","user_name":"张玉帅"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111610004020","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1756784118,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFF3DD","can_worn":false,"id":2,"name":"永不书荒","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2c704b96a929a7a8b3461ddbf49a8d01","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b93ef223f8131d9ee8e8312f642d9681"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7144134959681244194","book_info":{"abstract":"【反派】+【无敌】+【校花】+【反套路】
牧安穿越到了一个多重都市爽文小说组成的世界。
明明自身颜值顶尖，家财万贯，权势滔天，却注定要成为众多主角装逼打脸的垫脚石，最后还要沦落到家破人亡的结局？
好在天命大反派系统加载成功，只要引起女主的情绪波动，就能获得无数奖励。
甚至包括关于未来的剧情！
遗憾文主角：“宝藏女孩将是我的囊中之物，那个富二代算什么东西......不是，凭什么他变成了最后的赢家？连白月光也喜欢他？”
歪嘴龙王：“待我完成隐忍考验成为龙王殿的新主人，必让他家破人亡...什么？他才是下一任龙王殿的主人？我只是一个爱跳舞的Joker？”
高手下山：“我，医武无双，校花的贴身高手，打你的脸是你的荣幸...见鬼！我以为自己已经够装了，没想到他才是扮猪吃老虎的老祖宗！”
牧安却微微一笑。
对不起，当反派，我可是专业的！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/87735e613394623a4b31df1825cfe9da","author":"蓝凉","author_id":"","book_id":"7144134959681244194","book_name":"反派：我在女主身边捡奖励","book_short_name":"夺情反派","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282838","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":385,"name":"校花","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=385&name=校花&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7144135203055731230","read_count":"16665","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1527132"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.6","serial_count":"672","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越,多女主,反派,穿书,校花","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b486b145c3562d3dec9eca393f6ad062~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779283826&x-signature=nTqvRRuDQsplP83d4Ir4rBKPGyQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2480961749006248","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.7739334e+07"},"
